old_value: {"id":"broadside-e37d.12","title":"Webhook ingestion endpoint","description":"POST /hook/{persona}?key={secret} — key-authenticated endpoint for external systems (CI, CMS). JSON body: content (required), content_type (optional, default text/plain, supports text/markdown via pulldown-cmark), media array (optional, objects with url and description). Fetch media URLs with 30s timeout, 10MB max, image-only validation. Sanitize content with ammonia. Return 401 for bad key, 422 for invalid payload.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","owner":"mark@wolfssl.com","created_at":"2026-07-17T22:38:56.701195346Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-17T22:38:56.701195346Z","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"broadside-e37d.12","depends_on_id":"broadside-e37d","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-07-17T22:38:56.708010202Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","metadata":"{}"},{"issue_id":"broadside-e37d.12","depends_on_id":"broadside-e37d.5","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-07-17T22:39:20.022850124Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","metadata":"{}"},{"issue_id":"broadside-e37d.12","depends_on_id":"broadside-e37d.6","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-07-17T22:39:20.051997194Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","metadata":"{}"}]}

new_value: RSS/Atom poller, webhook endpoint, directory watcher all implemented. Sanitization via ammonia, markdown via pulldown-cmark.
